title: Mutual Friends & A Comeback 🤝
excerpt: Added Mutual Friends, FR+ subscriptions, major popup upgrades, performance improvements, and dozens of community-requested fixes.
body:
Recently, Friends Remover was hit hard by the removal of our extension. After weeks of rebuilding and improving, we're finally back—and stronger than ever.

This update introduces some of our biggest features yet, including Mutual Friends, FR+ subscriptions, improved security systems, performance upgrades, and dozens of bug fixes requested by the community.

Thank you to everyone who supported Friends Remover during this journey. We couldn't have made this comeback without you.

added.text: Special welcome messages for FR+ users
added.moreInfo: Plus users now receive exclusive welcome messages when opening the menu, replacing the standard welcome messages shown to regular users.

We added a new Flagged filter to the filter menu. If you have any flagged friends, you can now filter your friends list to view only those users. The Flagged filter option will only appear if you have at least one flagged friend; otherwise, it will remain hidden.

Introducing Smart Suggest. Smart Suggest recommends friends that you may want to pin based on factors such as how long you've been friends and how many mutual friends you share. This feature can be disabled at any time in the Settings > General tab.
Added a mutual friends viewer directly inside the popup.
The bio section in Compact Viewer has been replaced with 'Friends Since'.

We added an advanced bot protection system to detect when a user may be interacting with the extension using automated tools or bot-like browser behavior. When suspicious activity is detected, additional verification challenges (such as extra captchas) may be shown. This system is still in development and will be expanded and improved in future updates.
FR+ has been converted from a gamepass to a subscription-based membership of R$115/Month.
Users must now provide an email address before purchasing FR+.
Users are now required to accept the FR+ policy before purchasing.

Was originally planned to be one of our biggest new features, but we didn’t have enough time to fully develop or test it. Because of that, we weren’t able to add a beta badge before release, but it is now available for users.
Added an Unpin option to pinned users when bulk selecting users.

removed.moreInfo: This feature has been permanently removed and will not return.

removed.text: Notify if a Friend Removes You from FR+
removed.moreInfo: This feature is no longer exclusive to FR+.
The Rocaptcha in settings page has been removed.

fixed.moreInfo: Settings no longer incorrectly switch to the mobile layout when resizing the window with settings page active.
Search and filter buttons now properly disable during loading and menu screen.
Fixed Block Mode logo incorrectly appearing when opening the popup.
Added a cache for the last applied theme to prevent the blue theme flash during startup.
Fixed it not allowing you to unpin banned users.
Fixed the popup using saveSetting() instead of the correct setSetting() method.
Fixed the menu failing to open after previously being opened and closed.
Fixed this unnecessary notification appearing incorrectly and removed it completely bye-bye bug.
Fixed a one-character typo causing the Search button to disappear after closing history.

improved.moreInfo: Compact Viewer arrows now loop continuously.
Status text now shows 'Logged in as [username]' instead of displaying the user ID.
Now uses the Roblox API for subscriptions on startup
The menu can now be accessed while removal screens are running.
Updated how the popup handles and visually displays active removals.
Improved the resume system for paused removals.
Toast notifications now use capture-phase event listeners for guaranteed execution.
Rocaptcha now skips headless avatars and avatars with identical colors all over their avatar.
Game titles now truncate around 26–28 characters.
Friend request states are now stored locally and persist after reopening the popup.
Bulk selections now survive closing and reopening the popup.
The friends list now refreshes immediately after untrusting a user.

other.text: Schedule Removal upgrade toast for non-Plus users

other.moreInfo: Attempting to add-back an existing friend in unfriend history now shows a toast instead of failing.

other.text: Code 5 error handling in Unfriend History
other.moreInfo: If you try clicking add-back to an existing outgoing friend requests now display a proper toast and automatically mark the button as sent.
429 errors now display a toast letting you know. that you adding people to quickly.
